metadata.title: Cabañas Marinas | Oceanfront Cabins
metadata.description: Oceanfront cabins to truly disconnect. Book by the hour or for a full day.

auth.title: Sign in
auth.description: Use Google to continue with your reservation.

phoneDialog.title: What is your phone number?
phoneDialog.description: We will use it to coordinate your arrival and confirm your reservation on WhatsApp.
phoneDialog.yappyNotice: If you pay with Yappy, the payment request will be sent to this number.
phoneDialog.numberTooShort: The number for {country} must have {digits} digits.
phoneDialog.numberTooLong: The number for {country} cannot have more than {digits} digits.
phoneDialog.saveError: Could not save the phone number.
phoneDialog.saveRetryError: Could not save the phone number. Please try again.

sections.plansSubtitle: Choose between 4 hours, 8 hours or the special sunrise experience.
sections.activitiesSubtitle: Discover ways to enjoy the sea and slow down.
sections.socialDescription: Follow us on Instagram and discover the moments we live by the sea every day.

brand.headline: Oceanfront cabins to truly disconnect
brand.subtitle: Unforgettable hours by the sea for your favorite kind of plan.

about.title: What is Cabañas Marinas?
about.description: A private oceanfront space to disconnect for a few hours or a full day.

benefits.title: Oceanfront
benefits.description: Open views, constant breeze and a real coastal atmosphere.

benefits.title: Private space
benefits.description: A place reserved for your group, without noise or crowds.

benefits.title: Great for groups
benefits.description: Flexible for families, couples or friends.

benefits.title: Natural setting
benefits.description: Surrounded by nature with a slow, relaxing rhythm.

benefits.title: Large capacity
benefits.description: Up to 16 people with comfort and privacy.

plans.name: 4 hours
plans.rule: Includes round-trip boat transfer + full grill.
plans.schedule: Choose your slot between 8:00 a.m. and 10:00 p.m.
plans.note: Perfect for a quick seaside escape.

plans.name: 8 hours
plans.rule: Equipped terrace with cushions and board games.
plans.schedule: Full day with a wide schedule
plans.note: To enjoy everything with time to spare.

plans.name: Sunrise experience
plans.schedule: Fixed time to watch the sunrise
plans.note: A quiet experience, ideal for photos and relaxation.

activities.title: Oceanfront kayak
activities.description: Launch straight from the beach to explore the coast.

activities.title: Sunrise and coffee
activities.description: The first rays of light with an open ocean view.

activities.title: Relaxing afternoons
activities.description: Spacious areas to unwind and share with your group.

location.title: Location
location.description: Punta Burica, 04015, Limones, Chiriquí Province. A natural setting with ocean access and a location that is easy to open in your map app.

faq.question: What is the minimum number of guests?
How does the minimum charge work?
faq.answer: A minimum equivalent to 4 people is charged on weekdays and 6 on Sundays or holidays.

faq.question: Are there special sunrise hours?
faq.answer: Yes. The sunrise package runs from 6:00 a.m. to 9:00 a.m.

faq.question: What are the general operating hours?
faq.answer: General hours run from 8:00 a.m. to 10:00 p.m.

reviews.title: Reviews
reviews.subtitle: Real comments from guests who experienced the calm, breeze and moments by the sea.
reviews.modalDescription: Your comment will stay pending review before being shown publicly.
reviews.emptyTitle: There are no published reviews yet
reviews.emptyDescription: Be the first person to leave an impression about your visit.

finalCta.title: Your next escape by the sea starts here.

reviews.commentPlaceholder: What did you enjoy most about your visit?
reviews.showMyNameDescription: The public name you write below will be shown.
reviews.anonymousDescription: We will publish the review without showing your identity.
reviews.imagesHelp: You can attach up to 2 JPG, PNG, or WEBP photos. Each file must be 5 MB or less before compression.
reviews.invalidImageCount: You can attach up to 2 photos per review.
reviews.invalidImageType: We only accept JPG, PNG, or WEBP images.
reviews.invalidImageSize: Each photo must be 5 MB or less before upload.
reviews.imageUploadError: We could not upload one of the selected photos.
reviews.imageRegisterError: We could not register one of the uploaded photos.
reviews.submitPartialSuccess: Your review was sent. We saved {uploaded} of {total} photos; the rest could not be attached.
reviews.consent: I authorize Cabañas Marinas to publish this review on the site once it is approved.
reviews.submitError: We could not send your review. Please try again.
reviews.submitSuccess: Thanks. Your review was sent and will go through moderation.
reviews.loginRequiredTitle: Sign in to leave your review
reviews.loginRequiredDescription: You can share this link directly with your client. Once signed in, they can complete the full review form on this page.

page.title: Choose your date, time and plan in one flow
page.description: This view is focused only on booking. If you already have a pending reservation or need follow-up, you can still go back to the home page to review its status.

wizard.loadFormError: Could not load the booking form.
wizard.submitSuccess: Reservation requested. Complete payment to confirm.

errors.notAuthenticated: Sign in to complete the reservation.
errors.invalidTimeRange: The selected time is not valid.
errors.invalidPeopleCount: Enter the number of guests to continue.
errors.minPeopleRequired: The minimum charge for this date applies even if fewer people attend.
errors.noCabinAvailable: There are no cabins available for that time.
errors.maxPeopleExceeded: The maximum capacity per reservation is 16 people.
errors.generic: The reservation could not be completed.

confirmation.singleActive: You can only have one active reservation. If you want to book another date, contact us on WhatsApp.
confirmation.pendingPayment: Pending payment: the reservation is confirmed once we receive payment. You can pay here or arrange payment over WhatsApp.

whatsapp.intro: Hi, I want to coordinate the payment for my reservation.
whatsapp.name: Name: {value}
whatsapp.final: To confirm your reservation, complete the 50% payment using the selected method.

4H.label: 4 hours
4H.note: Ideal for a short oceanfront escape.

8H.label: 8 hours
8H.note: A full day to enjoy at a slower pace.

AMANECER.label: Sunrise experience
AMANECER.note: Wake up early with your group to enjoy sunrise by the sea.

paddleboard.label: Paddleboard
paddleboard.description: Paddle board for calm rides near the coast.

kayak.label: Kayak
kayak.description: Single kayak to paddle and explore the marine area.

mascara_bucear.label: Snorkel mask
mascara_bucear.description: Mask for snorkeling and watching fish near the shore.

cana_pesca.label: Fishing rod
cana_pesca.description: Rod ready for recreational fishing from the shore.

sofa_marino.label: Floating sofa
sofa_marino.description: Inflatable sofa to float and relax in the water.

wakeboarding.label: Wakeboarding
wakeboarding.description: Board with tow rope to glide behind a boat at speed.

guests.title: How many guests are coming
guests.subtitle: Children pay 50% of the adult rate.
guests.minCopy: Booking starts from 2 people. The minimum charge is 4 on weekdays and 6 on Sundays or holidays.
guests.minWarningTitle: The minimum charge for this date is {minPeople} people.
guests.minWarningBody: The minimum price covers maintenance, transportation and facilities.

datePackage.title: Choose your package first
datePackage.calendarLocked: Pick a package first to unlock the calendar.
datePackage.calendarHint: Choose a date to pick your time.
datePackage.noAfternoonLabel: No time slots in this range.
datePackage.noEveningLabel: No afternoon or evening time slots.
datePackage.customHelp: Start time between 8:00 A.M. and 12:00 P.M.
datePackage.customError: The end time must be 10, 11 or 12 hours later.

availabilityErrors.noCabin: There are no cabins available for that time.
availabilityErrors.maxPeople: The maximum capacity per reservation is 16 people.
availabilityErrors.invalidPeople: Enter the number of guests to continue.
availabilityErrors.invalidRange: The selected time is not valid.
availabilityErrors.generic: There is no availability for that time.

extras.title: Extras for your plan
extras.subtitle: Add equipment if you want a more complete experience.
extras.arrivalNote: You can also add extras when you arrive.

summary.title: Summary
summary.subtitle: Confirm the details before sending your request.
summary.minWarning: The minimum charge for this date is {minPeople} people.

paymentMethods.title: Payment method
paymentMethods.subtitle: Choose how you want to confirm your reservation.
paymentMethods.sendInitial: Send the initial payment to the Yappy number:
paymentMethods.afterPayment: After making the payment, message us on WhatsApp with the receipt to confirm your reservation.

account.subtitle: Here you can review your booking status and the available options.

draft.message: There is a booking in progress. Continue where you left off.

reservations.allConfirmed: Your bookings are confirmed or completed.

changeRequest.help: You can only add guests or extras. To change the date or time, contact us on WhatsApp.
changeRequest.success: Request sent. We will confirm through WhatsApp.

whatsapp.intro: Hi, I have a booking pending payment.

payment.noResult: We could not find the payment result. If you completed the payment, send us the receipt on WhatsApp to confirm it.
payment.saveCode: Save this code; you will need it to identify your payment.
payment.finalStep: Final step: send us the receipt
payment.finalStepBody: Your reservation will be confirmed once our team verifies the payment. Send us a screenshot of the receipt on WhatsApp with the reservation ID.
payment.tryAgainBody: You can try again or contact us on WhatsApp to arrange another payment method.

confirmWhatsapp.intro: Hi, I made my card payment and I am attaching the receipt to confirm my reservation.

reservationWhatsapp.intro: Hi, I want to confirm my reservation with payment.
reservationWhatsapp.final: To confirm your reservation, complete the 50% payment using the selected method.

header.completedBody: Your booking is confirmed and fully paid. We look forward to seeing you.
header.balanceBody: The 50% deposit is already confirmed. Pay the remaining balance to complete your booking.
header.chooseBody: Select a method to complete the 50% deposit and confirm your booking.

states.fullyPaidBody: We will see you on {date}. Enjoy it.
states.balanceBodyPrefix: Use the Yappy button to send the remaining balance of
states.balanceBodySuffix: directly to your registered Yappy number.
states.balancePolling: The balance payment flow has started. As soon as Yappy confirms it, we will update your booking.

amountSelector.question: How much would you like to pay now?
amountSelector.depositBody: Confirm your booking with the minimum required amount
amountSelector.fullBody: Pay the entire balance from the start

payment.officialButtonBody: Enter your Yappy number and your name as a note so we can identify your payment.
payment.officialButtonPolling: The Yappy flow has started. As soon as Yappy confirms the payment, we will update your booking.

manual.title: Manual Yappy, from the app
manual.subtitle: If the button is not working, use the static link. The team will confirm the payment manually.
manual.reminder: Remember to send us a screenshot of the receipt on WhatsApp to confirm your booking.
manual.noReservation: We could not find a pending booking to link the manual payment.
manual.prepareError: Could not prepare the manual reference for this payment.
manual.opened: We opened the Yappy link and marked the payment as manual in the system. Once you complete it, send the receipt on WhatsApp.
manual.openError: Could not open the manual Yappy flow.

whatsappCard.body: Contact us to coordinate payment or if you need help.

polling.fullyPaid: Your booking is paid in full. We will see you on the day of your visit.
polling.depositConfirmed: Deposit confirmed. Your booking is already confirmed. You can now pay the remaining balance.
